description: Single endpoint to approve or reject one or multiple leave requests — triggered from Approve / Reject buttons on the list or detail screen, and from the bulk-select action sheet

notes.leaveIds: array to support bulk actions from Select Multiple mode; single-item array for individual approve/reject
notes.reasonTags: optional; array of selected tag IDs — only applicable when action is 'reject'
notes.processed: count of successfully actioned leave IDs
